Localization.Description: Attempt to change the lifecycle of an object in a bucket

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing the lifecycle of an object in bucket {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the lifecycle of an object in bucket {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change the lifecycle of an object in bucket {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
